creator: paul.belair@rogers.com
text:
My printer works, I install windows today and used it. This problem is closed in other reports but I differ and have made the changes that others said worked for them. 

Can my HP LaserJet 1000 work with FreeBSD.

Please I have three girl in High School and everyone is very mad at me for trying to replace windows with this OS. 

PS I'm a newbie with about one month experience with FreeBSD.

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD
